title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 541.130 - Jury discharged without prejudice, when
text:
541.130.  Jury discharged without prejudice, when. — When a jury has been impaneled in the case contemplated in section 541.120, such jury shall be discharged without prejudice to the prosecution.
(RSMo 1939 § 3775) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3385; 1919 § 3730; 1909 § 4941
